hero.title: Mongolian Railway
hero.subtitle: Defining National Railway Development in the International Network
hero.description: Mongolian Railway JSC is a state-owned joint stock company responsible for building, owning, and operating railway infrastructure and transportation services in Mongolia.

services.title: Our Operations
services.subtitle: Reliable railway infrastructure and transportation solutions

passenger.title: Transportation Services
passenger.description: Reliable and safe passenger and cargo transportation services.

cargo.title: Infrastructure Development
cargo.description: Railway infrastructure construction and new route development.

infrastructure.title: Rolling Stock
infrastructure.description: Owning, operating, manufacturing, assembling, and repairing rolling stock.

international.title: International Cooperation
international.description: Cross-border transport corridors, international partnerships, and export transportation.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: History, mission, and values of Mongolian Railway JSC

history.title: Our History
history.description: Mongolian Railway JSC was established on March 5, 2008, by Resolution No. 82 of the Government of Mongolia and the decision of the State Property Committee on March 20. The company is responsible for building, owning, and operating railway infrastructure and conducting railway transportation activities.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To become the defining force of national railway development integrated into the international network.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To be the pillar of sustainable development.
